prose:
The frontier-orbitals calculation on formaldehyde was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The calculation converged SCF cycles, with a HOMO energy of approximately -7.65231 eV and a LUMO energy of approximately -1.78264 eV. The HOMO-LUMO gap is approximately 5.86967 eV.

Method used: B3LYP/def2-TZVP in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.
